name: @fnconfig-examples/basic
description: Standalone runnable @fnconfig/config example: layered configuration sources (in-memory, JSON, environment variables, command-line) bound into typed values via bindConfig + a hand-written SchemaFor<T>. No dependency-injection framework, no compiler transformer.

scripts.start: moon run examples-basic:build && APP_Server__Host=10.0.0.5 node dist/main.js --Server:Port 8080
